title: Gamemode Unlocked
description: Ever wanted to play on survival with the creative menu open here you go.
body:
Gamemode Unlocked

This mode is a 1.17.1 mod that adds an entirely new gamemode to minecraft!

Yes, you heard right a new gamemode. This gamemode adds the creative menu to a survival like gamemode called Unlockable*.

You can switch to it with the "/gamemode unlockable" command, create it on the world creation screen, use it with f3 + f4 screen,

or even play on LAN and servers with it  

 

It is not recommend using any mod that affects the world creation screen or LAN screen with this mod it will crash!!!

i.e. Fancy Menu will not work on the screens mentioned!

You can use this in modpacks but not again recommend!!
